title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXXVIII. Natural History.
content:
There was a little one-eyed gunner
        Who kill'd all the birds that died last summer.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXXVIII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
